page: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCEV5 family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This instance does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the hardware is premium storage capable. There are no integrated GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. Additionally, it includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and substantial memory footprint provide a stable environment for enterprise workloads without the risk of resource contention. The server is designed for memory-optimized workloads, enterprise databases, large-scale web applications, and general-purpose business applications requiring high core counts and dedicated compute resources.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v5 is an x86_64 server instance from the DCEV5 family, configured with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 256.0 GB of memory. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a resource ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, requiring external premium storage for data persistence and rendering it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated tasks. The instance also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for memory-intensive and general-purpose enterprise workloads, the DC64es_v5 offers dedicated compute resources to ensure consistent performance. It is suited for database deployments, enterprise applications, and large-scale business workloads requiring high CPU capacity and stable memory allocation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v5 is an x86_64 server in the DCEV5 family with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and no local storage, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC64es_v5 is an x86_64 server featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, designed for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core x86_64 server with two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of memory and premium storage capabilities.

256.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No local storage, requiring external premium storage
